HomePage.title: Hello Welcome to Next.js + shadcn/ui + tRPC
HomePage.description: This is a starter template with Tailwind CSS, shadcn/ui, tRPC, and env-nextjs.

trpcTest.title: tRPC + env-nextjs Test
trpcTest.description: Click the button to test the tRPC API with environment variables

Theme.description: Click the button in the top right to toggle themes
Theme.support: Supports light, dark, and system preferences.

Login.title: Login to your account
Login.description: Enter your email below to login to your account

Signup.title: Create your account
Signup.description: Fill in the form below to create your account
Signup.name: Full Name
Signup.emailDescription: We'll use this to contact you. We will not share your email with anyone else.
Signup.passwordDescription: Must be at least 8 characters long.
